---
title: "DAA KO"
---

### Differential abundance analysis

```{r setup}
library(maaslin3)

# Source group-assignment
source("../funct.R")

# Load the TreeSummarizedExperiment object
tse <- readRDS("../../data/tse.Rds")

ko_tse <- altExp(tse, "KO")

variable <- "diet" 
formula_used <- "~ diet * time + (1 | id)"
```

-   Group variable: **`r variable`**
-   Formula used: **`r formula_used`**

```{r data_prep}
# Create output directory for results
output_base_dir <- "../../output/daa/daa_ko"
dir.create(output_base_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
# Keep paired cases that have both time points
paired.cases <- names(which(table(colData(ko_tse)$id) == 2))
ko_tse <- ko_tse[, ko_tse$id %in% paired.cases]
```

```{r maaslin all}
# Run Maaslin3
# fit_out <- maaslin3(
#   ko_tse,
#   output = output_base_dir,
#   formula = '~ diet * time + (1 | id)',
#   normalization = 'TSS',
#   transform = 'LOG',
#   augment = TRUE,
#   standardize = FALSE,
#   median_comparison_abundance = FALSE,
#   median_comparison_prevalence = FALSE,
#   max_pngs = 100,
#   verbosity = "WARN"
# )
```

```{r}
# res_maaslin3 <- fit$fit_data_abundance$results %>% 
#   arrange(feature, name)
```

```{r print_table}
#| label: table-of-significant-results
daa_tab <- read_tsv("../../output/daa/daa_ko/significant_results.tsv", col_names = TRUE)
daa_tab <- daa_tab %>%
    filter(!is.na(feature)) %>%
    select(feature, metadata, value, coef, qval_individual, qval_joint, model)
if (knitr::is_html_output()) {
  datatable(
      daa_tab,
      options = list(
        pageLength = 6,
        dom = 'Bfrtip'
      ),
      caption = "Table of significant features",
      rownames = FALSE
  ) %>%
    formatSignif(columns = c("qval_joint"), digits = 3)
} else {
  library(kableExtra)
  daa_tab %>% 
    mutate(
      across(where(is.numeric), ~round(., 3)),
      feature = ifelse(nchar(feature) > 8, 
                     paste0(substr(feature, 1, 8), "..."), 
                     feature)
      #p.adj = signif(p.adj, 3)
    ) %>%
    kbl(caption = "Table of significant features",
        booktabs = TRUE,
        longtable = TRUE,
        align = c('l', 'r', 'r', 'r', 'r', 'r', 'r')) %>%
    kable_styling(latex_options = "repeat_header") %>%
    row_spec(0, bold = TRUE)
}

```

```{r print results}
png_files <- list.files(output_base_dir, pattern = "\\.png$", full.names = TRUE, recursive = TRUE)
```

![fig38](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/summary_plot.png) ![fig1](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_K00949_linear.png) ![fig2](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_K01756_linear.png) ![fig3](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_K02809_linear.png) ![fig4](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_K02810_linear.png) ![fig5](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_K03529_linear.png) ![fig6](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_K03786_linear.png) ![fig7](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_K05808_linear.png) ![fig8](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_K07496_linear.png) ![fig9](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_K08159_linear.png) ![fig10](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_K09117_linear.png) ![fig11](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_K13641_linear.png) ![fig12](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/linear/diet_K19302_linear.png) ![fig13](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K00950_logistic.png) ![fig14](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K01179_logistic.png) ![fig15](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K02048_logistic.png) ![fig16](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K03489_logistic.png) ![fig17](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K07458_logistic.png) ![fig18](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K08972_logistic.png) ![fig19](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K09692_logistic.png) ![fig20](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K17195_logistic.png) ![fig21](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K17235_logistic.png) ![fig22](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K19509_logistic.png) ![fig23](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/diet/logistic/diet_K21993_logistic.png) ![fig24](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/time/linear/time_K05966_linear.png) ![fig25](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/time/linear/time_K06893_linear.png) ![fig26](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/time/linear/time_K07979_linear.png) ![fig27](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/time/linear/time_K10797_linear.png) ![fig28](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/time/logistic/time_K00950_logistic.png) ![fig29](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/time/logistic/time_K01179_logistic.png) ![fig30](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/time/logistic/time_K02048_logistic.png) ![fig31](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/time/logistic/time_K02408_logistic.png) ![fig32](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/time/logistic/time_K03489_logistic.png) ![fig33](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/time/logistic/time_K08972_logistic.png) ![fig34](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/time/logistic/time_K17195_logistic.png) ![fig35](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/time/logistic/time_K17235_logistic.png) ![fig36](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/time/logistic/time_K19509_logistic.png) ![fig37](../../output/daa/daa_ko/figures/association_plots/time/logistic/time_K21993_logistic.png)
